prompt.name: S59.1 -- 静态挂载 + SkillTreeCard 组件
prompt.task: 1. api/main.py: reports 挂载旁新增 config 静态挂载 2. SkillTreeCard.tsx: fetch /config/skill_graph.json + dashFull.mastery_snapshot 3. 内置 CONCEPT_NAMES 映射表(19条) 4. 颜色编码: 绿≥0.7/黄0.3-0.7/灰<0.3或null/虚线黄=前置未满足 5. null mastery 显示"暂无学习记录"
prompt.go_gate: HTTP GET /config/skill_graph.json 返回JSON。SkillTreeCard 3场景正确
